fields.System.Title: Implement football_main_bronze ingestion and validation path
fields.System.Description:
# Implement football_main_bronze ingestion and validation path

> As a data platform engineer, I want a football_main_bronze ingestion and validation path, so that main-family football CSV data lands in consistent bronze parquet artifacts.

## Description

Implement the main family ingestion path for mmz4281 season/division CSV files with latin-1 handling.

Apply row-level validation for main-family records and frame-level validation before persistence.

Write bronze parquet outputs under football_main partitioning with stable structure.

## Dependencies

- Parent epic: Story #1.
- Depends on deterministic discovery/throttling behavior from Story #2.

## Notes

Lineage evidence:
- [architecture/football-data-ingestion.md](architecture/football-data-ingestion.md)
- [temp/8c8290a/extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json](temp/8c8290a/extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json)
- [temp/8c8290a/arch_extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json](temp/8c8290a/arch_extracted_architecture__football-data-ingestion.md.json)
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given mmz4281 season/division CSV inputs with latin-1 encoding, when ingestion runs, then rows decode and parse correctly.
- [ ] Given ingested rows, when row-level main schema validation runs, then invalid rows are surfaced per policy and valid rows continue.
- [ ] Given validated frames, when frame-level validation executes, then frame contract checks pass before write.
- [ ] Given successful processing, when outputs are materialized, then bronze parquet artifacts are written under football_main partitioning with consistent structure across runs.
